prompt: In this cash spot, choose the best action.
why_v1: Raise builds value when you likely get called by worse.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raising fits the track cue set, so the line applies pressure only when the read gives you a real leverage edge.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Raise because a disciplined cash preflop open should pressure weaker ranges before they can see a cheap flop.
